title: ink flow
blurb: Ink advected through a curl-noise field, accumulated in a buffer that is never cleared. Mouse stirs.

title: coral bloom
blurb: Two chemicals feeding on each other grow luminous-membraned colonies that split, merge, and wander. Draw to seed; R wipes the dish.

title: cathedral
blurb: One distance equation, folded ten times, breathing. Nothing is modeled; the architecture rebuilds itself forever. Drag to orbit.

title: ember field
blurb: 1,048,576 particles combed into silk filaments by a drifting field. No geometry is ever uploaded. The mouse is a vortex.

title: nebula
blurb: The million particles learn depth: a volume of embers gathering onto the intersection curves of two invisible drifting surfaces. Drag to orbit.

title: hyphae
blurb: Two rival slime molds — a million agents — negotiate one glass ball. Each follows its own scent and flees the other's; the territories are their own doing. Drag to orbit.

title: undertow
blurb: An actual incompressible liquid — 262,144 particles, pressure-projected — in a tank that rolls like a ship's hold. Flick the pointer to throw water.

title: nodal
blurb: A million grains of sand on a singing plate. Click once and your microphone chooses the figures — sound in, geometry out. The sand gathers where the plate is still.

title: tremor
blurb: 24,451 real earthquakes, 1975 to yesterday, replayed through a wave equation on the globe. No coastlines are stored — the plate boundaries draw themselves. Drag to orbit.

title: archive
blurb: The same 24,451 earthquakes as 009, but now the function changes instead of the data: a million particles morph between globe, time helix, magnitude wall, and storm — each transition sweeping in chronological order.

title: pupil
blurb: A 2,339-parameter neural network training by backprop, live, in fragment shaders. The image is its current belief; the sparks are its training samples. Click to make its world your camera.

title: engram
blurb: 011's cure: five trainable feature grids give the live-training network real eyesight — coarse thoughts first, fine detail etched in seconds, like a photograph developing. Its memory fades where it stops looking. Click for camera.

title: impasto
blurb: 012's engram learns the world; a painter with ~900 brushes a frame repaints only what changed. Strokes follow the image's grain, deposit thickness, and catch the light. Click for camera.
